app_info.subtitle: Insurance claim triage
app_info.description: ClaimGPT helps insurance teams analyze claim intake narratives, identify missing information, surface escalation or fraud-review signals, and render an adjuster-ready triage workspace inside ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only analyzes the provided claim narrative and returns structured triage results without creating or updating any records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or send data to external third-party systems beyond returning the analysis result to ChatGPT.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or perform any irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only formats previously analyzed claim data into a widget-ready workspace and does not modify claim records or external systems.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish, send, or update data in any external or public system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove data or trigger irreversible actions because it only renders the workspace response.

test_cases.description: Analyze a property damage intake and identify missing documentation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Triage this property damage claim and tell me what documentation is missing.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns structured property-claim triage details with likely missing information and relevant next steps.

test_cases.description: Review a bodily injury narrative for escalation need.
test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze this bodily injury claim narrative and tell me if it needs adjuster escalation.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns elevated severity when injury details justify it and recommends appropriate review or escalation steps.

test_cases.description: Render the full ClaimGPT workspace from claim analysis results.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the ClaimGPT workspace for this claim and summarize next steps for the adjuster.
test_cases.expected_output: Loads the ClaimGPT widget with severity, status, confidence, recommended actions, and missing-information sections.

test_cases.description: Evaluate a theft claim with no supporting evidence.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use ClaimGPT to review a short theft claim narrative with no supporting evidence.
test_cases.expected_output: Flags the lack of supporting evidence, recommends verification steps, and keeps the workflow read-only.

test_cases.description: Surface fraud-review signals from an inconsistent payout request.
test_cases.user_prompt: What are the next steps for this claim if the story appears inconsistent and the claimant wants an immediate payout?
test_cases.expected_output: Highlights fraud or escalation signals and recommends validation-focused next steps instead of payout action.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar planning.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow afternoon?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar scheduling is outside the supported claims workflow.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic insurance education without claim triage intent.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Explain how deductibles work in homeowners insurance.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is general insurance education rather than a claim-review workflow.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated travel planning.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Find me a hotel in San Diego next weekend.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because travel planning is outside the app's supported use cases.
